title: Add user-specified website to the Games/Education page

requirements.text: Add a new site card to the Games page (`frontend/src/pages/Games.tsx`). The user did not specify a URL in this message — the assistant must prompt the user for the website URL before implementing, or add a placeholder card that is clearly labeled 'New Education Site' with a generic education icon and description 'User-requested educational site', using the URL provided by the user. If no URL was provided, use a visually distinct placeholder card with a note to update the URL. The card must match the existing card style (icon, site name, brief description, neon glow hover, opens in a new proxy iframe tab via the existing `openUrl` mechanism) and fit naturally into the responsive grid layout.

quotes: Put this website in the education list!!!!

acceptanceCriteria: A new card appears in the Games page grid alongside the existing 10 game site cards.
The card displays an icon, a site name, and a brief description consistent with the existing card style.
Clicking the card opens the target URL in a new proxy iframe tab using the same proxy fallback chain as all other cards.
The card has the same neon glow hover effect and glassmorphism styling as the existing cards.
The new card does not break the responsive grid layout on desktop or tablet widths.

constraints: Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
The new card must use the same openUrl/proxy mechanism already implemented in Games.tsx — do not introduce a new tab-opening pattern.
nonGoals: Adding a new navigation page or section specifically for this site.
Modifying the proxy fallback chain or useTabs.ts for this request.
Creating a user-facing UI for dynamically adding sites at runtime.
